data.title: SEMIFIVE files pre-IPO review on KRX in South Korea on July 17, 2025. Leading design solution provider initiates IPO application.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, SEMIFIVE, a prominent design solution provider and innovator of platform-based custom silicon solutions based in Seoul, South Korea, revealed the submission of its initial IPO application to the Korea Exchange (KRX). This milestone signifies the formal initiation of its public offering process.

data.title: US House passed crucial crypto bills, including the GENIUS Act. SEC Chair called it a milestone for crypto with praise from industry leaders like Coinbase CEO. Market close to clear regulatory framework.
data.description: The House of Representatives in the U.S. recently passed key pieces of legislation aimed at establishing clear working rules for the cryptocurrency industry. One of the bills that passed is the GENIUS Act, also known as the stablecoin bill, which SEC Chair Paul Atkins called a "historic milestone" for crypto entrepreneurs and market participants. This move was celebrated by the cryptocurrency community and top officials of the Trump administration. Brian Armstrong, CEO of Coinbase Global Inc., described the development as "huge," stating that the industry is close to having a clear regulatory framework. Jeremy Allaire, co-founder and CEO of Circle Internet Financial, also commended Congress for its efforts. The passage of these bills is seen as a significant step towards providing clarity and regulation for the cryptocurrency market in the United States.

data.description: Chainalysis played a crucial role in uncovering a National Crime Agency (NCA) officer's embezzlement of confiscated Bitcoin from Silk Road 2.0. This incident underscores the significance of blockchain technology in fighting financial crimes. data.title: Kraken launches US futures trading as Congress progresses with GENIUS and CLARITY Acts, marking a pivotal moment for US crypto policy.
data.description: The launch of Kraken's new features coincides with progress in Congress on the GENIUS and CLARITY Acts, representing a significant shift in U.S. cryptocurrency policy.

data.title: NVIDIA rolls out safety measures for agentic AI, tackling risks like prompt injection and data leak.
data.description: NVIDIA recently introduced a new safety protocol designed to improve the security and regulatory adherence of interactive artificial intelligence technologies. The safety recipe specifically focuses on mitigating risks related to timely unauthorized access and inadvertent data exposure, aiming to enhance the overall safety measures of AI systems. The initiative comes as part of NVIDIA's ongoing efforts to prioritize safety and compliance in the development of AI, highlighting the company's commitment to addressing security concerns. The new safety protocol is expected to bolster the safety of AI systems, tackling key vulnerabilities and promoting secure implementation.

data.title: Citi and Ant International pilot AI forecasting solution for airlines to enhance FX risk management.
data.description: Citi and Ant International revealed their partnership in Singapore today to pilot the use of Ant International's Falcon Time-Series Transformer (TST) Model for an improved FX risk management solution. This initiative, developed with aviation clients in mind, seeks to provide enhanced payment solutions for the airline sector, which handles billions of payment transactions each year. As global airline travel is projected to witness ongoing expansion, the collaborative solution aims to address the rising demands in the industry.

data.title: Mining company raises $6M, switching from Bitcoin to Ethereum. Aiming for tens of millions in ETH reserves by year-end.
data.description: A mining company has successfully secured $6 million in funding and has announced plans to shift focus from Bitcoin to Ethereum. The company aims to accumulate tens of millions in Ethereum reserves by the end of the year.

data.title: MFDS approves DeepQure's HyperQure™ for atrial fibrillation clinical trial in South Korea.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, on July 17, 2025, it was reported that DeepQure received approval from the Ministry of Food and Drug Safety (MFDS) to conduct a clinical trial for their HyperQure™ RDM System. This innovative laparoscopic renal denervation (RDN) system is aimed at treating atrial issues. This approval marks a significant step for DeepQure as they move forward with their medical technology.

Chris Martin shames embarrassed kiss-cam couple at Coldplay show During a recent Coldplay concert, frontman Chris Martin called out a couple who tried to hide their faces after being caught on the kiss cam, joking with the crowd as their moment played out on the big screen.
